question.text: Every real estate mutual fund scheme shall invest at least what percentage of net assets directly in real estate assets?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Every real estate mutual fund scheme shall invest at least 35% of the net assets of the scheme directly in real estate assets. **The Trap:** 75% is the combined limit for real estate assets and related securities, not the direct investment minimum. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The 35% direct investment ensures genuine real estate exposure in the scheme.
